skillsApplied.title: Counting Recent Publications via Sorted Results

finalAnswer: Yesterday, on Saturday, June 27, 2026, there were 0 articles with the keyword 'autonomous vehicles' published in the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science' section of ArXiv.

trajectory.intent: Click on Advanced Search to go to the advanced search page.
Navigate to the constructed ArXiv search URL for 'autonomous vehicles' in the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science' category on yesterday's date (2026-06-27).
Check the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science (eess)' subject checkbox.
Select the 'Past 12 months' radio button under Date section.
Click the search button to submit the query.
Click on the 'Sort results by' dropdown.
Navigate to the same search results page but ordered by submission date (newest first) by setting the 'order' URL parameter to '-submitted_date'.
Scroll down to inspect more search results.
Yesterday, on Saturday, June 27, 2026, there were 0 articles with the keyword 'autonomous vehicles' published in the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science' section of ArXiv.

judge.reasoning:
Based on the provided screenshot and response, the task was to determine how many articles with the keyword 'autonomous vehicles' were published in the 'Electrical Engineering and Systems Science' (eess) section of ArXiv yesterday (Saturday, June 27, 2026). 

Since ArXiv does not publish or announce new papers on Saturdays, the count of 0 articles is correct. The search results shown in the screenshot confirm that the most recent submissions listed are from June 25, 2026, and earlier, with none published on June 27, 2026.

Therefore, the task has been successfully completed.

SUCCESS
